MainApplicationScope - Class in com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.internal.scope
ApplicationScope for the main codebase.
MainApplicationScope(JvmScope) - Constructor for class com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.internal.scope.MainApplicationScope
 
MainConfiguration - Class in com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.internal.scope
Configures the behavior of a single verifier.
MainConfiguration() - Constructor for class com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.internal.scope.MainConfiguration
Creates a new configuration: With an empty context. That throws the default exception type. Whose assertions are enabled if assertions are enabled on this class. That omits exception stack traces that reference this library. That shows the difference between the actual and expected values. That invokes Arrays.toString() for arrays and Object.toString() for all other objects to convert them to a String.
MainGlobalConfiguration - Class in com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.internal.scope
Default global configuration.
